title: Alef E2E Test Fixture
description: Schema for alef e2e test fixture files. Each file contains either a single fixture object or an array of fixtures.

id.description: Unique snake_case identifier used as the test function name

category.description: Test category. Defaults to parent directory name if omitted

call.description: Named call config to use. References [e2e.calls.<name>]. Defaults to [e2e.call] when omitted

input.description: Input data passed to the function under test. Fields map to args via [e2e.call.args] config

assertions.description: List of assertions to check on the result

languages.description: Languages to skip. Empty array means skip all

field.description: Dot-separated field path on the result object

value.description: Expected value (type depends on assertion type)

method.description: Method name to call on the result

check.description: Assertion check type for the method result (equals, is_true, is_false, greater_than_or_equal, count_min)

args.description: Arguments to pass to the method call
